rows.label: qev065502_MSG0001
rows.name:
Phew...
We partied like crazy again last night, didn't we.
Hehe, everyone is so energetic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065502_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hm... What is it? Do you have business with me?
Alright, as your senior in life,
I'll teach you all sorts of things, young lady.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065502_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask her what kind of personality she has.

rows.label: qev065502_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell her that Lyvia wants to meet her.

rows.label: qev065502_MSG0003
rows.name:
It's nothing to brag about, but I'm a sloppy woman.
Though there are some customers who come to the shop
who say they like that part of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065502_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Eh? What shop, you ask?
Hehe, that's a secret.
But it's a very fun shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065502_MSG0005
rows.name:
...I don't have a man right now.
There are plenty of men who hit on me, but
there just aren't many good ones, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065502_MSG0006
rows.name: Eh? There's a man who wants to meet me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065502_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Hehe, I'm quite the sinful woman too.
I wonder how many this makes this month?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065502_MSG0008
rows.name:
Well alright, I'll at least meet him.
He might turn out to be a good man, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065502_MSG0009
rows.name:
He's quite a good man, isn't he.
To think a man like this is serious about me...
Hehe, it's not a bad feeling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065502_MSG0010
rows.name:
Such a good man, yet he's so pure...
I feel like I might be the one getting serious here.[ST:wait ]
